Breaking Down Emotional Story Emails
(The #1 Type Of Email For Affiliates and Cold Traffic)
What they are
- WW2 Vet
- A1C email
Why they work
- People relate to emotional stories. They see
themselves in it. It’s also a big PROOF element
4 Must-Have Parts Of Your Story
- Grab my attention right away (most people make
the mistake of trying to build up the story, so it starts
slow. Start with something that grabs attention right
away)
- Big stakes on the line (losing your husband, playing
guitar in front of your crush, your doctor tells you your
legs will need to be amputated, you’re a week away
from being evicted from your apartment for late
payment)
- BIG transformation
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 6 --

- you were living out of your car and eating at a soup
kitchen...now you’re a millionaire
- you were on your deathbed and doctors gave you 2
weeks to live, now you’re running marathons
- Credible, believable characters - the ww2 vet story
has a LOT of credibility because he’s a ww2 vet
(especially to a conservative reader). You want readers to
have sympathy for the character the email is about
How to write the story
1. Paint the nightmare scenario that the person was in.
Show what was going on… how they felt (hopeless,
sad, frustrated etc…). Show what’s at stake. This
should be focused on a specific moment. Take the
reader on a journey with them.
2. Show how they hit their breaking point, and tried to fix
the problem (usually the options they tried failed, or
didnt work well enough). Show the struggle, the
doubt, how they felt about it all
3. Turning point
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 6 --

4. Paint the “rosy picture” of how life is for them now -
how they feel, how their day is different
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
